name: Institution of Occupational Safety and Health
summary: The world's largest chartered body for safety and health professionals. EIOSH delivers IOSH Managing Safely V5.0, Working Safely and tailored enterprise variants.
highlights: Chartered in the UK, recognised globally
Benchmark HSE qualification for managers and supervisors

name: OSHAcademy Safety & Health Training
summary: Independent provider of online occupational safety and health training, with stackable certificates aligned to US OSHA and international best practice.

name: OSHAwards UK
summary: International awarding body for safety, environment and quality qualifications, with approved centres across the Middle East, South Asia and Africa.

name: Highfield Awarding Body for Compliance
summary: One of the UK's leading Ofqual-recognised awarding bodies for food safety, health & safety, and compliance qualifications.

name: OTHM Qualifications
summary: Ofqual-regulated awarding body offering Level 3–8 qualifications in business, HR, health & social care and occupational health and safety.

name: National Association of Safety Professionals
summary: One of the leading US safety certification bodies, offering CSM, CSHO and CSD designations recognised by employers across North America and the Gulf.

name: International Certification Board for Qualifications
summary: UK-registered certification board issuing globally portable qualifications in health, safety, environment and allied disciplines.

name: Global Awards
summary: Global Awards issues international qualifications across safety, environment and professional-development disciplines, with an approved-centre network in the GCC and South Asia.
highlights: Approved centres across the GCC and South Asia

name: IQ Occupational Health & Safety
summary: A specialist OHS awarding body whose qualifications are mapped to ISO 45001 and audited for industry employability.

name: COSH Learning Partner
summary: EIOSH partners with COSH learning providers to deliver the Certificate ,Diploma and industry-sector certificates.

name: Institute of Environmental Management & Assessment
summary: Environmental and sustainability qualifications for professionals leading ESG and carbon-literacy programmes.
